name: POE Build Check

on: [push]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Setup .NET
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: '8.0.x'

      - name: Build Project
        run: dotnet build --configuration Release
